nasb.text: that they would seek God, if perhaps they might grope for Him and find Him, though He is not far from each one of us;

esv.text: that they should seek God, and perhaps feel their way toward him and find him. Yet he is actually not far from each one of us,

cnv.text: 要他們尋求　神，或者可以摸索而找到他。其實他離我們各人不遠，

ccb.text: 以便他们在其间寻求祂，或许他们可以摸索着找到祂。祂原本就离我们各人不远，

csbs.text: 好让他们寻求神，或许因此真能摸索而找到他。其实他离我们每一个人并不远，
